description: This function performs spatial clustering on gene expression data using the STclust method.
author: GenePattern Team
plan:
## spatialGE.STclust GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
spatialGE.STclust is a GenePattern module that This function performs spatial clustering on gene expression data using the STclust method.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 11 parameters:
- Required: input.file, dynamic.tree.cut
- Optional: output.file, tissue.images, spatial.weight, distance.metric, linkage.method, number.of.genes, deep.split, minimum.clusters, maximum.clusters

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript <libdir>stclust_wrapper_ai.R -j <job_id> -e <input.file> --ws <spatial.weight> --dist_metric <distance.metric> --linkage <linkage.method> --ks <dynamic.tree.cut> --mink <minimum.clusters> --maxk <maximum.clusters> --topgenes <number.of.genes> --deepSplit <deep.split> --output <output.file>    <tissue.images>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/spatialgp.preprocessing\:0.4

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.file
parameters.description: STList object in .RDS file format to cluster on.

parameters.name: output.file
parameters.description: Path to save the output STlist object. Default is 'output.RData'.

parameters.name: tissue.images
parameters.description: Tar gz compressed file of the images of the samples in the STList object.

parameters.name: spatial.weight
parameters.description: Weight to be applied to spatial distances (0-1). Default is 0.025.

parameters.name: distance.metric
parameters.description: Distance metric to be used. Default is 'euclidean'.

parameters.name: linkage.method
parameters.description: Linkage method applied to hierarchical clustering. Default is 'ward.D2'

parameters.name: dynamic.tree.cut
parameters.description: Whether to automatically determine the number of clusters using Dynamic Tree Cut.

parameters.name: number.of.genes
parameters.description: Number of genes with highest spot-to-spot expression variation. Default is 2000

parameters.name: deep.split
parameters.description: Logical or integer (1-4) to control cluster resolution. Default is FALSE

parameters.name: minimum.clusters
parameters.description: Minimum number of clusters (tissue domains). Must be >\= 2. Only used if Dynamic Tree Cut is false.

parameters.name: maximum.clusters
parameters.description: Maximum number of clusters (tissue domains). Only used if Dynamic Tree Cut is false.
